data_coverage_summary: RESTful API for creating and managing various objects in the Lifecycle Twin. Published API scope focuses on twin objects, attached records, and lifecycle workflow artifacts.
buyer_guidance: Use this API when the integration needs digital twin records, documents, and lifecycle workflow objects in Building X.
overview: RESTful API for creating and managing various objects in the Lifecycle Twin. Lifecycle Twin is positioned as a digital twin and lifecycle management surface rather than a live telemetry feed. Asset data is Supported. Telemetry data is Un-Supported. Writeback is Supported.

available_data.description: Published API scope focuses on twin objects, attached records, and lifecycle workflow artifacts.

ingest_considerations: The published surface includes mutation or submission capabilities, so integrations should enforce explicit governance around which upstream systems are allowed to write.
Representative operations were pulled from the published spec artifact to keep the capability classification tied to the documented surface.

source_evidence.evidence_notes: Classification is based on the official Siemens product overview and the published spec artifact for Lifecycle Twin API.
